degraded: complexity classifier returned risk_flags touches_auth + touches_migrations from message-prose keywords (the spec mentions RLS/migration/schema as SURFACE examples for required_layers inference); the diff touches NO auth/migration file — it adds an adopt tool + two pure libs + a compliance phase-list line. The authoritative diff-predicate risk floor is 'small'; the medium+ review path was run regardless.

surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling change: a new adopt onboarding step (seed_traceability_baseline.py + traceability_baseline/traceability_layers pure libs) + a one-line compliance phase wiring. No runnable app surface (web/cli/api) is added or modified. The tool's CLI surface is exercised end-to-end by 6 subprocess E2E tests over temp adopt-shaped repos (with-tests / no-tests / predeclared-decisions / dry-run / idempotency), each spawning the real tool + the real Step F collector.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — adopting a with-tests fixture populates test-traceability.json (a tagged unit test lands as an FR-01.01 unit coverage link), infers required_layers, and scaffolds the @FR convention into .claude/rules/
behaviors.evidence: test_seed_traceability_baseline.py::test_with_tests_repo_scaffolds_tags_and_populates_baseline PASSED (asserts the scaffolded rule, the manifest unit link for FR-01.01, and inferred_legacy provenance)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — orphan/unmapped candidates are recorded as tracked triage carrying the TT6 category (unmapped = review candidate, never a stale accusation); a zero-test repo adopts cleanly with an empty-but-present manifest and no false gate
behaviors.evidence: test_with_tests_repo... (dedupKey adopt-unmapped:: + 'never'/no-'stale' assertions) + test_zero_test_repo_adopts_cleanly (manifest EXISTS, empty, inferred_legacy → advisory) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC3 — snapshot.json shape is unchanged (baseline lives in a separate compliance manifest + adopt summary); the WebUI snapshot contract test stays green
behaviors.evidence: test_snapshot_contract.py (9 tests) PASSED; no analyze_codebase / SNAPSHOT_SCHEMA_VERSION change in the diff

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — NEW RED-before/green-after tests over adopt fixtures (with-tests, no-tests, predeclared-decisions); framework suites green
behaviors.evidence: test_traceability_baseline.py (13) + test_seed_traceability_baseline.py (6) PASSED; adopt 419 + compliance 1104 + shared 4174 green

behaviors.behavior: AC5 — footprint within adopt skill/scripts + tests; source files ≤300 LOC (273/161/197); SKILL.md ≤300; bloat baseline not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: wc -l all new source ≤300; test_skill_references_link.py::test_kern_skill_md_under_300_loc PASSED; no shipwright_bloat_baseline.json change

behaviors.behavior: Binding §11-R5 — the predeclared-decision path resolves an ambiguous FR unattended and writes the decision back to the spec BEFORE Step F, so the collector's manifest carries the decided layers; it NEVER stalls (no fixture → inference_default)
Binding §11-R5 — a repo-wide (NOT diff-scoped) skip inventory reuses the TT4 Python + TS/JS scanners and files every pre-existing skip as triage, pruning vendored dirs
behaviors.evidence: test_skip_inventory_catches_python_and_ts_skips_repo_wide (node_modules pruned) + the with-tests E2E skip triage PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Code-review C2 — --dry-run mutates nothing on disk (no rules, no triage, no summary) yet still reports would-be actions
Doubt D1 — the repo-wide walk prunes vendored/build dirs DURING descent (os.walk in-place dirnames prune), so a large committed node_modules on a brownfield-JS repo is never recursed into
behaviors.evidence: test_traceability_baseline.py::test_enumerate_prunes_vendored_dirs_during_descent PASSED (a node_modules/ test file is not enumerated)

behaviors.behavior: Doubt D2 — the spec Layers write-back honours \| escapes + a cell-count-vs-header guard (no mis-column), preserves CRLF (raw bytes + keepends), and is idempotent (unchanged cell → no write)
Doubt D3 — the repo-wide inventory also flags unconditional @pytest.mark.skip (the commonest disable idiom) via a local AST scan, without touching the shared scanner's cross-consumer contract
Doubt D4 — above 10 findings the skip inventory rolls up into ONE summary triage card (per-pattern count, max severity) instead of flooding the Inbox; at/below, granular
Doubt D5 — --dry-run routes the TT6 backfill report to a temp dir so .shipwright/backfill/ on the adopted repo is never created (preview mutates nothing)

Doubt D7 — a fast NON-slow guard subprocesses only the collector over a tiny fixture and asserts the @pytest.mark.covers tag → FR-01.01 unit coverage link, so the wiring is gated by the default lane even if the slow lane is excluded
